theme_description: Policy library theme for legal and compliance sites—terms, privacy, cookies, acceptable use, and DPAs—with versioning and update notices.

index.name: Home (root)
index.description: Root landing page with language chooser and search.

channel.name: Channel
channel.description: Channel page under a language root, listing its policies.

logo_url.label: Logo image URL
logo_url.info: Optional. If set, the header shows this logo; otherwise the site favicon and name are shown.

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used for analytics, customer service bot, etc.

footer_menu_html.label: Footer menu HTML
footer_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
footer_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used for footer navigation, friend links, SEO links, etc.

geoip_api_url.label: GeoIP API URL
geoip_api_url.info: Returns a JSON object containing country_code/country fields.

legal_nav_items.label: Custom nav HTML
legal_nav_items.info: Optional. If set, overrides default nav links.
